title: Implement Delete Tick
description: Allow campaign owners to delete specific ticks (except Tick 1) and cascade the timeline state forward.
execution_steps: Implement state recalculation logic when a tick is deleted.
Add Delete button with warning in frontend for ticks.
definition_of_done: DELETE endpoint works for campaign owners on ticks > 1.
Tick is removed and state cascades forward.
Frontend provides delete option for ticks.
